name: Holiday Nut Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the grated carrots, chopped onions, crushed garlic, ground walnuts, whole wheat flour, wheat germ, tamari, and water in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Add the rosemary and thyme to the mixture and stir gently until incorporated.
3. If the mixture is too dry, add more water gradually until it holds together without being sticky.
4. Transfer the mixture into a greased 9x9 baking pan and spread evenly.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Serve with gravy made by sautéing mushrooms in oil, adding water gradually, and stirring in tamari to taste. Sprinkle with a pinch of thyme.
